IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (22323967.pdf)
SUMMARY: Versatile media professional with background in Communications, Marketing, Human Resources and Technology.
SKILLS: Adobe Photoshop, ADP, Asset Management, branding, brochures, content, Customer Care, Final Cut Pro, graphics, HR, Illustrator, InDesign, innovation, inventory, Lotus Notes, marketing, materials, Microsoft Office, SharePoint, newsletter, presentations, process improvement, Project Management, promotional materials, publications, quality, recruitment, reporting, RFP, sales, stories, Employee Development, video, web design, website, articles

SOURCE: 22323967.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Specialist
COMPANY: US HR Operations Company Name
DATES: 09/2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed communication regarding launch of Operations group, policy changes and system outages.', 'Designed standard work and job aids for comprehensive training program.', 'Audited job postings and conducted background checks.', 'Conducted monthly new hire benefits briefings.', 'Served as a link between HR Managers and vendors.', 'Provided real-time process improvement feedback.', 'Re-branded US HR Operations SharePoint site.', 'Managed RFI/RFP for Background Check and Drug Screen vendor.']

SOURCE: 22323967.pdf
JOB TITLE: IT, Marketing and Communications Co-op
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2014 to 05/2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Posted articles and updates on corporate SharePoint site.', 'Researched and drafted articles for company activities.', 'Co-edited content for quarterly newsletter.', 'Provided communication support for events.', 'Collaborated with Communication team to develop marketing materials.', 'Led product launches for Digital Asset Management tool, Marketing Toolkit website, and Executive Tradeshows Calendar.', 'Created presentations for management approval.']

SOURCE: 22323967.pdf
JOB TITLE: Relationship Coordinator/Marketing Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 10/2012 to 01/2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed in-house advertising program.', 'Coordinated pre- and post-show activities at trade shows.', 'Managed marketing campaigns for new business generation.', 'Ordered marketing collateral.', 'Improved marketing programs to increase product awareness.', 'Prepared internal promotional publications.', 'Partnered with graphic designers on brochures.']

SOURCE: 22323967.pdf
JOB TITLE: Assistant Head Teller
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 09/2009 to 10/2012
DESCRIPTION: ['Performed daily and monthly ATM audits.', 'Educated customers on retail products.', 'Met or exceeded quarterly sales goals.', 'Promoted company brand identity.']
